notes: v1.14.117 - Ask PHANTOM card: Rule F consistency fix (UI walkthrough DRIFT, corrected mock phantom-ask-card-corrected-mock.html). The v1.14.115 Ask card read as isolated from the Command surface: it was full-bleed (16px wider than the NBA card each side), used different padding (16->18px) and margin (14->12px), an uncontained 64px prism with a 62px floating image, oversized 23px title, and a neutral/cyan-glow border instead of the card's violet accent. CORRECTED to match the NBA neighbor + the approved mock: card inset to NBA width (margin 0 16px 12px, width auto - verified left/right pixel-identical to .nba), 18px padding, violet accent border (color-mix --vio 42%), prism now a 56px violet-tinted box (--vio 15% bg / 30% border, radius 8) holding a 36px mark, title 18px, 11px mono uppercase label, 13px desc. askBreathe (kept; not flagged) now animates the contained 36px mark. body.rd-only; legacy (?legacy=1) untouched. CSS-only, no markup/JS change, no new assets. Browser-verified at 412x915 (agent-browser): Ask card left/right match NBA, prism 56px box + 36px img, title 18px. node --check x3 + sw.js, brace gate, three-stamp lockstep, CRLF-preserving. The broader Rule A-F consistency sweep remains a separate later pass. DEVICE-VERIFY: Command page - Ask card sits flush under NBA, same width, prism in a tinted box, reads as part of the surface; tap still opens the Voice Assistant sheet in-frame; ?legacy=1 unchanged.
